summary_en: 150,000 shares (2.91% of S/O excl. treasury) up to ¥300M. Period: Jun 1 – Sep 30, 2026. Method: open-market purchase. Price ceiling not disclosed. Rationale: shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice of Decision on Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Company Rules Under Article 459, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: TESEC Corporation's board resolved on May 26, 2026 to authorize a treasury stock acquisition program under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act and the company's articles of incorporation. The company will acquire up to 150,000 ordinary shares (2.91% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥300 million over the period June 1 through September 30, 2026. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency in response to changing business conditions. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 364,442 treasury shares against 5,214,253 shares outstanding (excluding treasury).
